allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("c:\\Users\\ASUS\\Desktop\\DokLynk\\doklynk-next\\image\\DokLynk.png"\); function Crop\($x,$y,$w,$h,$name\) { $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($w, $h\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.DrawImage\($src, \(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,0,$w,$h\)\), \(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\($x,$y,$w,$h\)\), [System.Drawing.GraphicsUnit]::Pixel\); $bmp.Save\("$env:TEMP\\$name.png", [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\) }; Crop 1000 1150 1900 1000 "dk-home-1"; $src.Dispose\(\); Write-Output "done")

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("c:\\Users\\ASUS\\Desktop\\DokLynk\\doklynk-next\\image\\DokLynk.png"\); function Crop\($x,$y,$w,$h,$name\) { $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($w, $h\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.DrawImage\($src, \(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,0,$w,$h\)\), \(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\($x,$y,$w,$h\)\), [System.Drawing.GraphicsUnit]::Pixel\); $bmp.Save\("$env:TEMP\\$name.png", [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\) }; Crop 4300 4800 2000 2000 "dk-home-a"; Crop 6300 4800 2000 2000 "dk-home-b"; $src.Dispose\(\); Write-Output "done")

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("c:\\Users\\ASUS\\Desktop\\DokLynk\\doklynk-next\\image\\DokLynk.png"\); function Crop\($x,$y,$w,$h,$name\) { $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($w, $h\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.DrawImage\($src, \(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,0,$w,$h\)\), \(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\($x,$y,$w,$h\)\), [System.Drawing.GraphicsUnit]::Pixel\); $bmp.Save\("$env:TEMP\\$name.png", [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\) }; Crop 4540 5820 480 1000 "dk-s1"; Crop 5010 5820 480 1000 "dk-s2"; Crop 5450 5820 480 1000 "dk-s3"; Crop 5890 5820 480 1000 "dk-s4"; $src.Dispose\(\); Write-Output "done")

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "PID $\($_.OwningProcess\) - $\($p.ProcessName\)" } } else { Write-Output "port 5173 free" })
